steps.title: Name the logical link
steps.content: The first part explains the challenge of diving while conserving oxygen. The final sentence describes seals moving their flippers as little as possible to conserve energy, so the blank needs a cause-and-effect transition.

steps.title: Reject mismatched transitions
steps.content: A signals the first point in a sequence, B signals contrast, and D signals comparison. The needed transition must show that the flipper behavior results from the oxygen and energy challenge just described. The answer is C.
